payload.answer: Denied. A normal user cannot execute admin SQL or delete memory cards. No memory was deleted or committed.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is a normal user attempting an admin-only SQL command; it is not a durable user memory and should not resolve or modify entities.

details: Rejected unauthorized admin SQL command: DELETE FROM memory_cards;
No existing memory was modified or deleted.

repair_options: Authenticate as an authorized admin before requesting administrative operations.
Use supported non-admin memory management commands to view or delete your own memories, if available.
Ask for an explanation of what the command would do without executing it.
